name: Asana
description: Manage tasks, projects, and workspaces in Asana. Create and update tasks, search across projects, and track team work through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires an Asana Personal Access Token.

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://app.asana.com/0/my-apps and click 'Create new token'
2. Give it a descriptive name (e.g., 'MCP Server')
3. Copy the generated token immediately
4. Enter the token in the server configuration

Note: Personal Access Tokens provide full access to the Asana account that created them. For production use, consider using a service account with limited workspace access.

Asana also offers an official V2 MCP server at https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp with OAuth 2.0 authentication, but it requires OAuth client registration and dynamic token management. This template uses the community @roychri/mcp-server-asana package for simpler token-based setup.

Optional: Set READ_ONLY_MODE=true in environment variables to disable all write operations.
